title: verbascum × florinense
intro: Verbascum × florinense, a hybrid plant of the Verbascum genus, is a flowering perennial known for its tall spikes of white flowers. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine, particularly for their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × florinense make it beneficial for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other ingredients to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to promote relaxation and soothe irritated skin.
